meaning: n.[鍖籡鐧借鐞冨噺灏戠棁
examples: The patient developed diarrhea, fever and leucopenia during anti-rheumatoid drug treatments.
Objective To study the leukogenic effects on leucopenia model induced by X-ray and chemotherapy.
The common adverse reactions were leucopenia, anemia, neuro-sensory toxicity and gastrointestinal response.
